articles.title: Senate Testimony Reveals COVID mRNA Vaccines Triggered Cancer Relapses in Six Melanoma Patients
articles.summary: Oncologist Dr. Angus Dalgleish testified before the Senate that six melanoma patients relapsed within six weeks of COVID-19 booster shots. His clinical observations prompted investigation into mRNA vaccine-induced cancer progression—a connection the medical establishment refuses to acknowledge.

articles.title: Big Pharma's $10 Billion Acid Reflux Scam: Low Stomach Acid Treated with Deadly PPIs
